title: 購物退稅
desc: 詢價、試穿、尺寸、結帳、退稅、退貨退款

phrases.tip: 也可說 What's the price of this?
phrases.homophone: 好・馬取・易斯・利斯

phrases.tip: 店員問要不要幫忙時的禮貌回應
phrases.homophone: 愛姆・賈斯特・魯京・山克斯

phrases.tip: 百貨專櫃多為不二價、不殺價；殺價只在市集攤販
phrases.homophone: 依茨・兔・伊克斯潘西夫
肯・愛・踹・利斯・昂

phrases.tip: 付現說 I'll pay in cash.

phrases.en: Do you have this in a bigger size?
Do you have this in another color?
phrases.tip: 指定顏色可說 Do you have it in black?（美式拼 color）
fitting room = 試衣間，英式常說 changing room
詢問折扣 Is there any discount?
return = 退貨，記得帶收據與吊牌
太緊 too tight／太鬆 too loose
faulty = 瑕疵/故障，退貨最有力的理由

phrases.en: Can I get a tax refund?
phrases.tip: tax refund = 退稅，需帶護照
退稅與退貨都需要收據，記得留好

phrases.en: Could you fill out the tax refund form for me?
How much do I need to spend to qualify for the refund?

lines.en: Hi there! Can I help you find anything?
lines.zh: 您好！需要幫您找什麼嗎？

alt.en: Hello! Are you looking for anything special?
alt.zh: 您好！在找什麼特別的嗎？

alt.en: Welcome in! Let me know if you need help.
alt.zh: 歡迎光臨！需要幫忙再跟我說。

lines.en: I'm just looking, thanks. Oh, how much is this jacket?
lines.zh: 我只是看看，謝謝。喔，這件外套多少錢？

lines.en: That one is 89 dollars. It also comes in navy and gray.
lines.zh: 那件是 89 美元，還有深藍色和灰色。

alt.en: It's 89 dollars, and we have it in navy and gray too.
alt.zh: 89 美元，我們還有深藍和灰色。

alt.en: That's 89 dollars. The gray one is really popular.
alt.zh: 那件 89 美元，灰色那款很受歡迎。

lines.en: Nice. Can I try this on? And do you have it in a bigger size?
lines.zh: 不錯。我可以試穿嗎？還有，有大一號的嗎？

lines.en: Sure. The fitting room is right over there. Let me grab a large for you.
lines.zh: 當然，試衣間就在那邊。我幫您拿件大號的。

alt.en: Of course. Fitting rooms are on your left. I'll bring a large.
alt.zh: 當然，試衣間在您左邊，我拿件大號來。

lines.en: Thanks. This fits perfectly. I'll take it.
lines.zh: 謝謝，這件剛剛好，我要買這件。

lines.en: Great choice. Will you be paying by card or cash?
lines.zh: 很好的選擇。您要刷卡還是付現？

lines.en: By card, please. Can I get a tax refund on this?
lines.zh: 刷卡，謝謝。這個可以退稅嗎？

lines.en: Yes, you can. Do you have your passport with you?
lines.zh: 可以喔，您有帶護照嗎？

lines.en: I do. Could you fill out the tax refund form for me?
lines.zh: 有，可以幫我辦退稅表嗎？

lines.en: Of course. Here's your form and receipt. Show them at the airport.
lines.zh: 沒問題。這是您的退稅表和收據，在機場出示即可。

lines.en: Perfect, thank you so much!
lines.zh: 太好了，非常謝謝你！

title: 換匯銀行
desc: 換匯、提款機、匯率、刷卡糾紛

phrases.en: I'd like to exchange some money.
phrases.homophone: 愛・賴克・兔・伊克斯淺吉・桑・媽尼
威爾・易斯・惹・尼爾瑞斯特・A-T-M
肯・愛・配・引・卡許
哇茨・惹・伊克斯淺吉・瑞特・特day

phrases.en: I'd like to change these Taiwan dollars into US dollars.
phrases.tip: 換成日圓 into Japanese yen

phrases.en: Is there a commission or service fee?
Could I have some smaller bills?
phrases.tip: 美式 bills = 鈔票（英式說 notes）；coins = 硬幣

phrases.en: Can I withdraw cash with this card here?
phrases.zh: 我可以用這張卡在這裡提款嗎？

phrases.en: My card was declined. Can you check why?
phrases.zh: 我的卡刷不過，可以幫我查一下嗎？

phrases.en: Please charge it in the local currency, not Taiwan dollars.
phrases.zh: 請用當地貨幣結帳，不要用台幣。
phrases.tip: DCC（外幣直接換台幣）最坑，選當地貨幣結帳最省錢

phrases.en: Could I get a receipt for the exchange?

dialogue.title: 在銀行換匯與處理重複扣款

lines.en: Good morning. How can I help you today?
lines.zh: 早安，今天需要什麼服務？

alt.en: Hi there. What can I do for you?
Welcome. How may I assist you?
alt.zh: 歡迎，請問需要什麼協助？

lines.en: Hi, I'd like to exchange some money. Taiwan dollars into US dollars.
lines.zh: 您好，我想換錢，把台幣換成美金。

lines.en: Sure. How much would you like to exchange?
lines.zh: 好的，您想換多少呢？

alt.en: Of course. What amount are you changing today?

lines.en: I'd like to change ten thousand Taiwan dollars. What's the exchange rate today?
lines.zh: 我想換一萬元台幣。今天的匯率是多少？

lines.en: Today it's 32 Taiwan dollars to one US dollar. After a two-dollar service fee, that's about 310 US dollars.
lines.zh: 今天是 32 元台幣兌 1 美元。扣掉兩美元手續費後，大約是 310 美元。

alt.en: The rate is 32 to 1 today. So ten thousand comes to roughly 310 US dollars after the fee.
alt.zh: 今天匯率 32 兌 1，一萬元扣手續費後約 310 美元。

lines.en: That's fine. Could I have some smaller bills, please?
lines.zh: 沒問題。可以給我一些小鈔嗎？

lines.en: No problem. Here you go — mostly twenties and tens.
lines.zh: 沒問題，這是您的錢，大多是二十和十元的。

lines.en: Thanks. By the way, I think I was charged twice on my card here earlier.
lines.zh: 謝謝。對了，我剛剛在這裡刷卡，好像被扣了兩次款。

lines.en: I'm sorry about that. Do you have the receipt so I can check?
lines.zh: 很抱歉，您有收據嗎？我幫您查一下。

lines.en: Yes, here it is. There's a double charge for the same amount.
lines.zh: 有，在這裡。有一筆金額重複扣了兩次。

lines.en: You're right — I see the double charge. I'll reverse the extra one right away.
lines.zh: 您說得對，我看到重複扣款了，我馬上幫您取消多的那筆。

lines.en: Great, thank you for your help!
lines.zh: 太好了，謝謝你的幫忙！

title: 景點售票
desc: 買門票、開放時間、導覽、拍照

phrases.tip: 一大兩小 = one adult and two children
phrases.homophone: 凸・額斗特・踢kits・普利斯
好・馬取・易斯・額d密遜

phrases.en: What time do you open and close?
phrases.zh: 你們幾點開門、幾點關門？
phrases.homophone: 哇特・太m・讀・you・歐盆・an・克落斯

phrases.tip: No flash, please = 請勿使用閃光燈

phrases.homophone: 威爾・阿・惹・瑞斯特潤斯

phrases.tip: student ticket = 學生票，記得帶學生證

phrases.en: What time is the last entry?
phrases.tip: 也可說 When's last admission?（last entry 是時間點，不用 start）

phrases.en: Do you have an audio guide in Chinese?
Could you take a photo of us, please?
phrases.tip: 請人幫拍照的禮貌說法

phrases.en: Is there a map or a brochure?
Do we need to book in advance?
phrases.tip: book in advance = 事先預約

lines.en: Hello! How many tickets would you like?
lines.zh: 您好！請問要幾張票？

alt.en: Hi there! How many tickets can I get you?
Welcome! How many in your group today?

lines.en: Two adult tickets and one child, please. Do you have student tickets?
lines.zh: 兩張成人票和一張兒童票，謝謝。有學生票嗎？

lines.en: We do. Does anyone have a student ID?
lines.zh: 有的，有人有學生證嗎？

alt.en: Yes, we offer them. Anyone with a student card?

lines.en: My daughter does. And are children under six free?
lines.zh: 我女兒有。還有，六歲以下小孩免費嗎？

lines.en: Yes, under six is free. So that's two adults and one student.
lines.zh: 是的，六歲以下免費。所以是兩張成人加一張學生票。

lines.en: Great. What time do you close today?
lines.zh: 太好了。你們今天幾點關門？

lines.en: We close at six, and the last entry is at five.
lines.zh: 我們六點關門，最後入場時間是五點。

alt.en: Closing is at six, and last admission is five.
alt.zh: 六點關門，最後入場是五點。

lines.en: Perfect. Is there an audio guide in Chinese?
lines.zh: 很好。有中文的語音導覽嗎？

lines.en: Yes, you can rent one at the desk on your left.
lines.zh: 有的，可以在您左邊的櫃台租借。

lines.en: Thanks. Can I take photos inside?
lines.zh: 謝謝。裡面可以拍照嗎？

lines.en: Photos are fine, but no flash, please. The restrooms are just past the entrance.
lines.zh: 可以拍照，但請勿使用閃光燈。廁所就在入口過去一點。

lines.en: Got it. Thank you so much for your help!
lines.zh: 了解，非常謝謝你的幫忙！
